text:
Market today: The market mood is cautious, driven by escalating geopolitical tensions around the Strait of Hormuz and warnings about excessive investor borrowing. This environment often leads to higher volatility, which hits your concentrated tech/chip positions and margin account hard.

Your holdings: SOXL is down 35.02% and needs immediate attention due to its leveraged nature and decay. SPAL, a new leveraged ETF, is also down significantly at 34% and very volatile; remember margin amplifies these drops. QQQI is down 1.77% and nearing its stop at 52.

Watch: Keep a close eye on any further developments regarding the Strait of Hormuz and any market reactions to the investor borrowing warnings.

Bottom line: Prioritize risk management and protect your capital in this uncertain environment.
plays: Respect QQQI stop at 52; consider trimming if it approaches.
Review SOXL and SPAL due to significant losses and leveraged decay.
No new buys today - hold and watch.
